hero.description: MarsAI is the digital platform of the international festival dedicated to short films (60 seconds max) created using generative AI tools. In 2026, our theme is “Imagining Desirable Futures”: stories that open possibilities and inspire positive trajectories.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.p1: MarsAI is an international festival dedicated to short films (60 seconds max) created with generative AI tools.
vision.p2: Each film must declare the AI tools used to ensure transparency and clarity of the creative process.
vision.p3: The festival is hybrid: an online platform + a physical event in Marseille.

quality.title: Quality, security & performance
quality.security: Server validation, role-based permissions and strong security.
quality.performance: Media optimization, lazy loading and API caching.
